scripts.build: mkdir -p app/static/vendor app/static/dist && cp node_modules/bootstrap/dist/css/bootstrap.min.css app/static/vendor/ && cp node_modules/bootstrap/dist/js/bootstrap.bundle.min.js app/static/vendor/ && cp node_modules/htmx.org/dist/htmx.min.js app/static/vendor/ && cp node_modules/sortablejs/Sortable.min.js app/static/vendor/ && esbuild app/static/app.js --minify --outfile=app/static/dist/app.min.js && esbuild app/static/style.css --minify --outfile=app/static/dist/style.min.css
